response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, some high-throughput systems experience, and open-source leadership, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his C++ exposure is limited to a short stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, with his depth being in D, TypeScript, and Node.js. He also lacks demonstrated cloud compute platform architecture experience and formal technical-leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Long-running ownership of an open-source platform (GISCollective) deployed on Kubernetes, showing end-to-end system ownership
Strong engineering-practices background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) plus mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief professional C++ experience (~6 months)
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale cloud architecture leadership experience
No formal technical-lead role managing cross-team priorities, deadlines, and deliverables

key_factors.factor: Limited formal technical leadership and cloud platform ownership
